headers.value: default-src 'self' https://*.spotify.com https://*.scdn.co https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net wss://*.firebaseio.com 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' https://*.spotify.com https://*.scdn.co https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com wss://*.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://sdk.scdn.co https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://*.googleapis.com https://*.spotify.com https://*.scdn.co https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; frame-src 'self' https://accounts.spotify.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://sdk.scdn.co; img-src 'self' data: https://*.googleapis.com blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://*.gstatic.com data:; media-src 'self' https://*.spotify.com;
